In this course, I'm going to show you how to make the single most important sale in your life and how to keep making that sale, that sale, that most important sale that will ultimately guarantee you are never without money and you are never without work. I will also show you here how to have greater levels of conviction and be more believable. How to even break the up and down syndrome. You know this, up one month, down the next. We're going to show you how to break and interrupt that permanently. And how to make sure that people never say no to you ever again.
